name: Suzanne Hale
body: Keeping you and all the family in my thoughts and prayers. Thank you for the update and the reminder that our focus is on God kingdom and what HE wants. He is providing so much for you and your family with such a great support of friends and family that are walking the walk with you.

name: Julie Hickman
body: Lov your updates Lee. Your transparency is so heart warming. To combat “worry”, I use Psalm 91:11

name: Julie Hickman
body: Lov your updates Lee. Your transparency is so heart warming. To combat “worry”, I use Psalm 91:11

name: Chuck N Lori W
body: Keeping you all in our prayers!! Thanks for the update. ((hugs))
